channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Shard Smart
item.description: Scale your database with sharding. Learn when and how to implement shard smart strategies.

item.title: Negotiate Your Worth
item.description: Boost your tech salary with proven negotiation scripts and strategies.

item.title: AI in Ed: Future Learning
item.description: Discover how AI is revolutionizing education and shaping the future of learning.

item.title: Scaling Redis
item.description: Learn patterns for scaling Redis in production, ensuring high performance & reliability.

item.title: Tech & Love
item.description: Explore how tech is redefining love, relationships & connections in the digital age.

item.title: AI Unmasked
item.description: Unlock AI secrets with Explainable AI. Learn how to make black boxes transparent.

item.title: Scaling URL Shorteners
item.description: Learn to design a scalable URL shortener handling billions of requests.

item.title: 10hrs Saved
item.description: Boost productivity with our AI workflow, saving 10 hours/week. Learn how

item.title: OAuth 2.0 & JWT
item.description: Unlock the secrets of OAuth 2.0 and JWT authentication! Explore their roles, benefits, and implementation tips in this comprehensive deep dive.

item.title: Top 5 Fastest Growing Tech Jobs
item.description: Discover the top 5 fastest growing tech jobs & start your dream career today

item.title: 2026 Tech Salaries
item.description: Discover 2026 tech salary trends: who earns what and why.

item.title: Auth Revamp
item.description: Discover modern authentication patterns for web apps in our 'Auth Revamp' blog post. Enhance security and user experience with the latest strategies!

item.title: Human Hack
item.description: Outsmart social engineers with insider tips on human psychology in cybersecurity.

item.title: 5G: App Dev Game Changer
item.description: Discover how 5G revolutionizes app development with faster speeds & lower latency.

item.title: Netflix: 200M Streams
item.description: Discover how Netflix handles 200M concurrent streams seamlessly

item.title: Ransomware 101
item.description: Discover how ransomware attacks work and learn essential strategies to protect your data. Equip yourself with survival tips in our comprehensive guide!

item.title: Debug Fast
item.description: Master quick debugging techniques with 'Debug Fast'! Discover strategies to uncover and fix bugs in minutes, boosting your coding efficiency. Read more!

item.title: 30-Day MVP
item.description: Launch your MVP in 30 days. Learn how to go from idea to launch quickly & effectively.

item.title: API Showdown
item.description: Discover the ultimate API showdown of 2026! Explore the strengths and weaknesses of GraphQL, REST, and tRPC to find the best fit for your projects.

item.title: Startup Mistakes
item.description: Learn from common startup mistakes to avoid costly errors and boost success.
